title: Spicy Cod Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy cod recipe from Slovakia, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the cod with salt and set aside.
Heat the spicy stir-fry mix in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shredded silk cabbage and cook until wilted.
Add the cod fillets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
